_comment: Latch-up control fixture: nwell with tap within 5 µm, n+/p+ separated by 1.5 µm across the well boundary. Expects 0 violations. All coordinates in µm.

nwell._comment: nwell spanning x=0..10, y=0..10. Centroid at (5, 5).

tap._comment: Tap inside nwell. Distance from nwell centroid (5,5) to tap centroid (2,2) ≈ 4.24 µm < 15 µm. Passes well-tap rule.

nsdm._comment: n+ region inside nwell. Right edge at x=8.0.

psdm._comment: p+ region outside nwell. Left edge at x=11.5. Distance to nsdm right edge (8.0): 11.5 - 8.0 = 3.5 µm > 0.84 µm. Passes adjacency rule.
